title: limonium tenellum
intro: Limonium tenellum, also known as Sea Lavender, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Limonium tenellum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote relaxation. Limonium tenellum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used to treat various health conditions, including insomnia, headaches, and skin irritations.
